title: SSB Client
description: Client-side modpack for the SSB server.
body:
# SSB Client

This is a modpack created for the SMP of my server. It contains a selection of client-side mods intended to enhance the gameplay experience when used on the SSB SMP server. 

This modpack was created solely with that purpose in mind, but others may use it if they please. No credit to me needed.

**I claim no rights to the content of this pack. Please refer to the original mods' license if you wish to learn more.**

## Included mods

### Visuals
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) (Server-side Fork)
- [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims)
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Satin Free Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/satin-free-wakes)
- [Spyglass Astronomy](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-astronomy)

### Fun
- [Bounced](https://modrinth.com/mod/bounced)
- [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)
- [Enchant Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchant-tweaker)
- [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)
- [Rolling Down in the Deep](https://modrinth.com/mod/rolling-down-in-the-deep)
- [Vectorientation](https://modrinth.com/mod/vectorientation)

### Enhancement
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

### Performance and technical
- [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
- [Chunky Border](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunkyborder)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody)
- [Modpack Update Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/modpack-update-checker)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
